description: Objective for fast single-loop distillation-like reflux control: hold control temperature in spec while minimizing reflux usage and movement. Violation/move weights are auto-derived from cv_priority + identified dynamics. 2026-05-26: switched to reward_mode=dmc (linear violation + quadratic move) with HIGH-side temperature limit 2.5x more urgent than LOW-side via cv_side_scale; cv_violation_weights_lo/hi and violation_rate_coef auto-derived in utils/auto_weights.py.
